name: MADFUT 26
description: Welcome to MADFUT 26! Click on a Special Badge to select it.

name: 121-RATED DRAFT
description: Build a 121-rated Draft, including a completed bench.
tier1: Build a 119+ Draft (rating + chemistry).
tier2: Build a 120+ Draft (rating + chemistry).
tier3: Build a 121+ Draft (rating + chemistry).

name: 100% COLLECTION
description: Collect every single card in the game. The ultimate achievement.
tier1: Collect 85% of all cards in the game.
tier2: Collect 95% of all cards in the game.
tier3: Collect 100% of all cards in the game.

name: GOLD COLLECTION
description: Collect all Non-Rare Gold cards in the game.
tier1: Collect 50% of all Non-Rare Gold cards.
tier2: Collect 90% of all Non-Rare Gold cards.
tier3: Collect 100% of all Non-Rare Gold cards.

name: 10 DOTDS IN A ROW
description: Complete 10 Drafts Of The Day in a row. Start over if you miss one.
tier1: Complete 2 Drafts Of The Day in a row.
tier2: Complete 5 Drafts Of The Day in a row.
tier3: Complete 10 Drafts Of The Day in a row.

name: 125 SQUAD BUILDER
description: Build a team in Squad Builder that has 33 Chemistry and 92+ Rating.
tier1: Build a squad with 33 Chemistry and 88+ Rating.
tier2: Build a squad with 33 Chemistry and 90+ Rating.
tier3: Build a squad with 33 Chemistry and 92+ Rating.

name: DRAFT WINS IN A ROW
description: Win multiple Draft Cup matches in a row. No draws!
tier1: Win 2 Draft Cup matches in a row.
tier2: Win 3 Draft Cup matches in a row.
tier3: Win 5 Draft Cup matches in a row.

name: FREE PACKS
description: Open 5K Free Packs. Take your time…
tier1: Open 500 Free Packs.
tier2: Open 2000 Free Packs.
tier3: Open 5000 Free Packs.

name: ICONS COLLECTION
description: Collect all standard ICON cards in the game.
tier1: Collect 10% of all standard ICON cards.
tier2: Collect 50% of all standard ICON cards.
tier3: Collect 100% of all standard ICON cards.

name: DRAFT CUP CHAMP
description: Win 7 WEEKLY Draft Cups - ultimate Draft mode competitions.
tier1: Win 2 weekly Draft Cups.
tier2: Win 4 weekly Draft Cups.
tier3: Win 7 weekly Draft Cups.

name: DRAFT: INVINCIBLES
description: Win a WEEKLY Draft Cup without losing a single match.
tier1: Win a Draft Cup with maximum 2 losses.
tier2: Win a Draft Cup with maximum 1 loss.
tier3: Win a Draft Cup without losing a single match.

name: RARE GOLD COLLECTION
description: Collect all Rare Gold cards in the game.
tier1: Collect 40% of all Rare Gold cards.
tier2: Collect 90% of all Rare Gold cards.
tier3: Collect 100% of all Rare Gold cards.

name: SILVER COLLECTION
description: Collect all Rare and Non-Rare Silver cards in the game.
tier1: Collect 30% of all Rare and Non-Rare Silver cards.
tier2: Collect 70% of all Rare and Non-Rare Silver cards.
tier3: Collect 100% of all Rare and Non-Rare Silver cards.

name: BRONZE COLLECTION
description: Collect all Rare and Non-Rare Bronze cards in the game.
tier1: Collect 30% of all Bronze cards in the game.
tier2: Collect 60% of all Bronze cards in the game.
tier3: Collect 100% of all Bronze cards in the game.

name: BULK SELLER
description: Quick sell cards with rating 82 or higher.
tier1: Quick sell 30 cards with rating 82 or higher.
tier2: Quick sell 70 cards with rating 82 or higher.
tier3: Quick sell 200 cards with rating 82 or higher.

name: 124-RATED DRAFT
description: Build a 124-rated Draft, including a completed bench.
tier1: Build a 122+ Draft (rating + chemistry).
tier2: Build a 123+ Draft (rating + chemistry).
tier3: Build a 124+ Draft (rating + chemistry).

name: PENALTY SPECIALIST
description: Win Draft Cup matches in penalty shoot-outs.
tier1: Win 1 Draft Cup match in a penalty shoot-out.
tier2: Win 2 Draft Cup matches in penalty shoot-outs.
tier3: Win 5 Draft Cup matches in penalty shoot-outs.

name: DEFENDER GOALS
description: Score goals with defenders in Draft Cup matches.
tier1: Score 2 goals with defenders in Draft Cup matches.
tier2: Score 5 goals with defenders in Draft Cup matches.
tier3: Score 10 goals with defenders in Draft Cup matches.

name: 15 CLEAN SHEETS
description: Play 15 Draft Cup matches without conceding a single goal.
tier1: Keep 2 clean sheets in any Draft Cup matches.
tier2: Keep 7 clean sheets in any Draft Cup matches.
tier3: Keep 15 clean sheets in any Draft Cup matches.

name: ONE CLUB DRAFTS
description: Build Drafts that have at least 5 players from the same club and 33 Chem.
tier1: Build 3 Drafts with 5 players from the same club and 33 Chem.
tier2: Build 10 Drafts with 5 players from the same club and 33 Chem.
tier3: Build 20 Drafts with 5 players from the same club and 33 Chem.

name: 128 SQUAD BUILDER
description: Build a team in Squad Builder that has 33 Chemistry and 95+ Rating.
tier1: Build a squad with 33 Chemistry and 93+ Rating.
tier2: Build a squad with 33 Chemistry and 94+ Rating.
tier3: Build a squad with 33 Chemistry and 95+ Rating.

name: 40 LIVE SBCS
description: Complete 40 DIFFERENT LIVE Squad Building Challenges.
tier1: Complete 5 DIFFERENT LIVE SBCs.
tier2: Complete 15 DIFFERENT LIVE SBCs.
tier3: Complete 40 DIFFERENT LIVE SBCs.

name: LOGIN REWARDS
description: Claim Daily Login Reward for 30 days in a row.
tier1: Claim Daily Login Reward for 7 days in a row.
tier2: Claim Daily Login Reward for 15 days in a row.
tier3: Claim Daily Login Reward for 30 days in a row.

name: MY CLUB: 9 IN A ROW
description: Fatal My Club: win 9 matches in a row.
tier1: Fatal My Club: win 3 matches in a row.
tier2: Fatal My Club: win 5 matches in a row.
tier3: Fatal My Club: win 9 matches in a row.

name: MY CLUB: INVINCIBLES
description: Fatal My Club: win 5 separate Series without losing a single game.
tier1: Fatal My Club: win 1 Series without losing a single game.
tier2: Fatal My Club: win 3 Series without losing a single game.
tier3: Fatal My Club: win 5 Series without losing a single game.

name: MY CLUB: 4 SEASONS
description: Fatal My Club: complete 4 full seasons (win every Series that week).
tier1: Fatal My Club: win every Series in one week.
tier2: Fatal My Club: complete 2 full seasons (win every Series).
tier3: Fatal My Club: complete 4 full seasons (win every Series).

name: FATAL DRAFT: 7 IN A ROW
description: Fatal Draft: win 7 matches in a row.
tier1: Fatal Draft: win 2 matches in a row.
tier2: Fatal Draft: win 4 matches in a row.
tier3: Fatal Draft: win 7 matches in a row.

name: FATAL DRAFT: 4 SEASONS
description: Fatal Draft: win Div 1 four times.
tier1: Fatal Draft: win 1st Division once.
tier2: Fatal Draft: win 1st Division 2 times.
tier3: Fatal Draft: win 1st Division 4 times.

name: DRAFT: 100K POINTS
description: Earn 100K Draft Building Points.
tier1: Earn 10K Draft building points.
tier2: Earn 40K Draft building points.
tier3: Earn 100K Draft building points.

name: DRAFT: GOLD I
description: Earn Gold I (or higher) Rank in Draft 10 times.
tier1: Earn Gold I (or higher) Rank in Draft 2 times.
tier2: Earn Gold I (or higher) Rank in Draft 6 times.
tier3: Earn Gold I (or higher) Rank in Draft 10 times.

name: DRAFT: ELITE I
description: Earn Elite I (or higher) Rank in Draft 7 times.
tier1: Earn Elite I (or higher) Rank in Draft 2 times.
tier2: Earn Elite I (or higher) Rank in Draft 4 times.
tier3: Earn Elite I (or higher) Rank in Draft 7 times.

name: DRAFT: LEGEND
description: Earn Legend Weekly Rank in Draft 3 times.
tier1: Earn Legend Weekly Rank in Draft.
tier2: Earn Legend Weekly Rank in Draft 2 times.
tier3: Earn Legend Weekly Rank in Draft 3 times.

name: H/L: STREAK
description: Reach a Win Streak of 50 in the Higher/Lower LTM.
tier1: Reach a Win Streak of 15 in Higher/Lower.
tier2: Reach a Win Streak of 30 in Higher/Lower.
tier3: Reach a Win Streak of 50 in Higher/Lower.

name: H/L: LTM CARDS
description: Upgrade all 3 LTM cards to their Maximum rating.
tier1: Upgrade 1 LTM card to the Max rating.
tier2: Upgrade 2 LTM cards to the Max rating.
tier3: Upgrade 3 LTM cards to the Max rating.

name: H/L: MARKET
description: Open every item in the LTM market during Higher/Lower LTM.
tier1: Open every single item in LTM market in 1 week.
tier2: Open every single item in LTM market in 2 weeks.
tier3: Open every single item in LTM market in 3 weeks.

name: FATAL SIM: 6 IN A ROW
description: Fatal Sim: win 6 matches in a row.
tier1: Fatal Sim: win 2 matches in a row.
tier2: Fatal Sim: win 4 matches in a row.
tier3: Fatal Sim: win 6 matches in a row.

name: FATAL SIM: 3 SEASONS
description: Fatal Sim: complete 3 full seasons (win every Series that week).
tier1: Fatal Sim: win every Series in one week.
tier2: Fatal Sim: complete 2 full seasons (win every Series).
tier3: Fatal Sim: complete 3 full seasons (win every Series).

name: 33-CHEM PUZZLES
description: Build 50 Draft Puzzles that have 33 Chemistry.
tier1: Build 7 33-chem Draft Puzzles.
tier2: Build 20 33-chem Draft Puzzles.
tier3: Build 50 33-chem Draft Puzzles.

name: DRAFT PUZZLES: CARDS
description: Upgrade all LTM cards to their Maximum rating.
tier1: Upgrade 1 LTM card to the Max rating.
tier2: Upgrade 2 LTM cards to the Max rating.
tier3: Upgrade 3 LTM cards to the Max rating.

name: DRAFT PUZZLES: MARKET
description: Open every item in the LTM market during Draft Puzzles LTM.
tier1: Open every single item in LTM market in 1 week.
tier2: Open every single item in LTM market in 2 weeks.
tier3: Open every single item in LTM market in 3 weeks.

name: HYBRID EXPERT
description: Build multiple Drafts with 33 Chemistry and 5+ Leagues.
tier1: Build 10 Drafts with 33 Chemistry and 5+ Leagues.
tier2: Build 30 Drafts with 33 Chemistry and 5+ Leagues.
tier3: Build 100 Drafts with 33 Chemistry and 5+ Leagues.

name: SPECIAL CARDS
description: Collect 500 different Special Cards.
tier1: Collect 50 different Special Cards.
tier2: Collect 200 different Special Cards.
tier3: Collect 500 different Special Cards.
